decision_rationale: The exchange-netflow hypothesis remains economically plausible, but immediate performance evaluation is on hold because no credential-free provider path was confirmed that is both timestamp-safe for historical BTC/ETH exchange inflow/outflow/netflow/balance and usable through current qfa ingestion. Coin Metrics community endpoints expose BTC/ETH exchange flow metrics and returned sample values without credentials, but the returned observations are latest/flash values with status-time fields long after the observation date; without as-of snapshots or a revision-history endpoint, using them for historical performance would embed revision/availability lookahead. Glassnode and CryptoQuant metric endpoints require credentials for the checked exchange-flow paths. Nansen docs are public, but API/data access was not confirmed credential-free. No performance metrics were computed.

hold.unblock_condition: Provide licensed or credential-free provider/API access with BTC/ETH exchange inflow, outflow, netflow, and exchange balance; as-of timestamps or revision history sufficient for historical simulation; documented publication lag and exchange-label revision policy; and qfa ingestion that avoids CSV fixtures and latest-revised lookahead.

fee_model.notes: Spot/mixed execution assumption documented for future BTC/ETH spot or perp evaluation. Funding was not evaluated because no perp implementation or performance run occurred.

minimum_needed_before_performance: Provider connector for BTC/ETH exchange inflow, outflow, netflow, and exchange balance with asset, metric, observation time, provider publish time, status, and revision/as-of fields.
Documented exchange-label revision policy and conservative publication lag; latest-revised-only series must be rejected for performance.

qfa crypto evaluator with maker/taker fees, optional funding if perps are used, BTC/ETH momentum and reversal controls, stablecoin-liquidity controls if available, missing/late metric handling, and random-window diagnostics.
No CSV fixtures, no user-facing data CSV argument, no daemon, no orders, and no raw provider dumps committed.

source_options_checked.evidence: Public catalog metrics list FlowInExNtv, FlowOutExNtv, FlowInExUSD, FlowOutExUSD, SplyExNtv, and SplyExUSD with daily BTC/ETH coverage. A no-credential sample request for 2024-01-01 through 2024-01-03 returned values for BTC/ETH exchange flow/supply metrics plus status and status-time fields. Raw payloads were not retained.
source_options_checked.timestamp_safety_notes: The checked samples were latest/flash observations whose status-time fields were in 2026 for 2024 observation dates. Without historical as-of snapshots or revision history, using current returned values for historical performance would be lookahead/revision unsafe. Potential provider route only if licensed or documented PIT/revision access is added.

source_options_checked.evidence: Lightweight requests to metrics catalog and a BTC exchange net transfer metric returned HTTP 401 Unauthorized. No credentials were used and no data was retained.
source_options_checked.timestamp_safety_notes: Candidate provider if licensed access includes exchange inflow/outflow/netflow/balance, historical availability timestamps, and label revision policy. Not usable credential-free in this scout.

source_options_checked.evidence: Public docs page was reachable. A checked BTC exchange inflow API-style endpoint returned HTTP 401 Unauthorized. No credentials were used and no data was retained.
source_options_checked.timestamp_safety_notes: Candidate provider if licensed endpoint documents publish lag and revisions. Not usable credential-free in this scout.

source_options_checked.evidence: Docs site was reachable. No open BTC/ETH historical exchange-netflow data endpoint was confirmed without credentials.
source_options_checked.timestamp_safety_notes: Possible provider route only with licensed access and explicit PIT/revision policy.
